person.name: Alice de Lucy
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
Alice was born in about 1207, probably in Egremont, Cumberland, England. She was the daughter of Richard de Lucy and Ada (Morville) de Lucy. After her father's death, her mother, Ada, married Thomas de Multon.

«b»Family«/b»
Alice married Alan de Multon, son of Thomas de Multon and Sarah de Flete, before 1219. Alan's father's second marriage had been with the widow of Richard de Lucy, and he had given a thousand Marks to the King for the wardship of Alice and her sister Amabel who were the heirs of Richard de Lucy. Subsequently both girls married their step-brothers, Thomas de Multon's sons by his first marriage.

«b»Alan and Alice had 1 son & 1 daughter.«/b»
1.) Thomas who took his Mother's surname.

2.) Joan who subsequently married Ranulph de Dacre.

«b»Death«/b»
Alice died circa 24 March 1288.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Lucy於1207年出生在英國波藍德時，她的父親Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland25歲，母親Ada de Morville23歲。她於1221年與Alan de Multon結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1288年3月24日在法國皮卡迪索姆享年81歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Lucey  .
French: habitational name from any of various places called Lucy, originally named with the Latin personal name Lucius + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lucey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Maeve, Niall.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Luasaigh, an altered form of Mac Cluasaigh, a Cork name meaning ‘son of Cluasach’, a byname originally denoting someone with large or otherwise noticeable ears (from cluas ‘ear’).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Lucy was born in 1207, in Cumberland, England, her father, Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland, was 25 and her mother, Ada de Morville, was 23. She married Alan de Multon in 1221. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 24 March 1288, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Lucy est née en 1207, à Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Ada de Morville, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Alan de Multon en 1221. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 24 mars 1288, à Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Lucy 1207 in Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland 25 und ihre Mutter Ada de Morville 23. Sie hat 1221 Alan de Multon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 24. März 1288 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Lucy è nata il nel 1207 nel Cumberland, England, sua padre, Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Ada de Morville, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Alan de Multon nel 1221. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 24 marzo 1288, nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 81 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Lucy(이)가 1207년 영국 c벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ada de Morville(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1221년 Alan de Multon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1288년 3월 24일 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Lucy nasceu em 1207, em Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Ada de Morville, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Alan de Multon em 1221. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 24 de março de 1288, em Somme, Picardie, França, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Lucy родилась в 1207 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Ada de Morville, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alan de Multon в 1221 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 24 марта 1288 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 81 год.
